meaning: Dual Inline Menory Modules,双列直插式存储模块
examples: Replace the faulty DIMM as soon as possible.
The DIMM on the controller needs replacement.
DIMM pairs must be matched in size, speed, and technology.
Also at the Summit Viking Technology was showing their NV-DIMM technology that can be used for data in-memory applications.
Expansion is limited to a pair of DDR3 SO-DIMM slots (16GB max), one full-size mini PCIe slot that supports mSATA SSD drives and one half-size mini PCIe slot that's perfect for WiFi and Bluetooth.
